Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class ProcessRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.ProcessRunner
public class ProcessRunner extends Object
Stateless process simulation runner for MCP integration.

Accepts a JSON process definition, optionally pre-validates it using Validator, then builds and runs either a ProcessSystem using ProcessSystem.fromJsonAndRun(String) or a multi-area ProcessModel when the JSON contains a top-level areas object. Returns the simulation result as a JSON string in the standard envelope format.

Input JSON Format:

{ "fluid": { "model": "SRK", "temperature": 298.15, "pressure": 50.0, "mixingRule":
 "classic", "components": {"methane": 0.85, "ethane": 0.10, "propane": 0.05} }, "process": [
 {"type": "Stream", "name": "feed", "properties": {"flowRate": [50000.0, "kg/hr"]}}, {"type":
 "Separator", "name": "HP Sep", "inlet": "feed"}, {"type": "Compressor", "name": "Comp", "inlet":
 "HP Sep.gasOut", "properties": {"outletPressure": [80.0, "bara"]}} ] }
Author:
Even Solbraa @version 1.0

  • Field Details

    • GSON

      private static final com.google.gson.Gson GSON

  • Constructor Details

    • ProcessRunner

      private ProcessRunner()
      Private constructor — all methods are static.

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Runs a process simulation from a JSON definition string.

      Delegates to ProcessSystem.fromJsonAndRun(String) and returns the result in the standard JSON envelope format with status, report, and any warnings or errors.

      Parameters:
      json - the JSON process definition
      Returns:
      a JSON string with the simulation result

    • validateAndRun

      public static String validateAndRun(String json)
      Validates and then runs a process simulation.

      First performs pre-flight validation using Validator. If validation finds errors, returns them without running the simulation. If only warnings are found, proceeds with the simulation and includes the validation warnings in the response.

      Parameters:
      json - the JSON process definition
      Returns:
      a JSON string with validation issues and/or simulation results

    • runTyped

      public static ApiEnvelope<ProcessResult> runTyped(String json)
      Runs a process simulation and returns a typed result.

      This is the typed counterpart to run(String). It accepts a JSON string (same format) but returns a typed ApiEnvelope with a ProcessResult payload for direct Java consumers.

      Parameters:
      json - the JSON process definition
      Returns:
      an ApiEnvelope containing the ProcessResult on success, or errors on failure

    • runProcessSystem

      private static String runProcessSystem(String normalizedJson, long startTime, boolean preValidationPassed, com.google.gson.JsonArray validationIssues)
      Runs a normalized single-area process-system JSON definition.
      Parameters:
      normalizedJson - the normalized JSON process definition
      startTime - the wall-clock start time in milliseconds
      preValidationPassed - true if Validator was already run successfully
      validationIssues - optional validation issues to include in the response
      Returns:
      JSON response containing simulation status, report, warnings, and provenance

    • runProcessModel

      private static String runProcessModel(String normalizedJson, long startTime, boolean preValidationPassed, com.google.gson.JsonArray validationIssues)
      Runs a normalized multi-area process-model JSON definition.
      Parameters:
      normalizedJson - the normalized JSON containing a top-level areas object
      startTime - the wall-clock start time in milliseconds
      preValidationPassed - true if Validator was already run successfully
      validationIssues - optional validation issues to include in the response
      Returns:
      JSON response containing model status, area metadata, report, warnings, and provenance

    • runTypedProcessModel

      private static ApiEnvelope<ProcessResult> runTypedProcessModel(String normalizedJson)
      Runs a normalized process-model JSON definition and returns a typed MCP envelope.
      Parameters:
      normalizedJson - the normalized JSON containing a top-level areas object
      Returns:
      typed process result containing the built ProcessModel, or errors on failure

    • buildProcessModel

      private static ProcessRunner.ProcessModelBuildResult buildProcessModel(String normalizedJson)
      Builds a ProcessModel from top-level areas JSON while preserving area-level build errors for MCP responses.
      Parameters:
      normalizedJson - normalized JSON containing named process areas
      Returns:
      build result containing the model, errors, and warnings

    • applyProcessModelExecutionSettings

      private static void applyProcessModelExecutionSettings(com.google.gson.JsonObject root, ProcessModel model)
      Applies top-level execution controls from ProcessModel JSON.
      Parameters:
      root - root JSON object containing optional execution settings
      model - process model to configure before running

    • extractModel

      private static String extractModel(String json)
      Extracts the EOS model name from the input JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - the input JSON string
      Returns:
      the model name, or "SRK" as default

    • extractMixingRule

      private static String extractMixingRule(String json)
      Extracts the mixing rule from the input JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - the input JSON string
      Returns:
      the mixing rule, or "classic" as default

    • extractEquipmentCount

      private static int extractEquipmentCount(String json)
      Counts the number of equipment entries in the process definition.
      Parameters:
      json - the input JSON string
      Returns:
      the equipment count, or 0 if not parseable

    • normalizeProcessJson

      private static String normalizeProcessJson(String json)
      Normalizes accepted process JSON variants to the canonical schema.

      Canonical schema expects process to be an array. Some legacy clients send {"process": {"equipment": [...]}}. This method converts the legacy shape to the canonical one while preserving all other fields.

      Parameters:
      json - raw process JSON
      Returns:
      canonical JSON string (or original input if not parseable)

    • isProcessModelJson

      private static boolean isProcessModelJson(String json)
      Checks whether a JSON string represents a multi-area ProcessModel.
      Parameters:
      json - the JSON string to inspect
      Returns:
      true if the root object has a JSON object named areas

    • extractAreaSummary

      private static String extractAreaSummary(com.google.gson.JsonObject areas, String fluidField, String defaultValue)
      Extracts a comma-separated summary of a fluid field across all process-model areas.
      Parameters:
      areas - the areas object from a ProcessModel JSON document
      fluidField - the field to extract from each area's fluid block
      defaultValue - fallback value when an area omits the field
      Returns:
      one value, or comma-separated values when areas differ

    • addValidationIssues

      private static void addValidationIssues(com.google.gson.JsonObject response, com.google.gson.JsonArray validationIssues)
      Adds validation warnings to a response object.
      Parameters:
      response - the response object to mutate
      validationIssues - validation issues returned by Validator

    • addValidationIssueLimitations

      private static void addValidationIssueLimitations(ResultProvenance provenance, com.google.gson.JsonArray validationIssues)
      Adds validation warnings to provenance limitations.
      Parameters:
      provenance - the provenance object to mutate
      validationIssues - validation issues returned by Validator

    • toJsonArray

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray toJsonArray(List<String> values)
      Converts a string list to a JSON array.
      Parameters:
      values - values to convert
      Returns:
      JSON array containing the string values

    • join

      private static String join(List<String> values, String delimiter)
      Joins string values with a delimiter.
      Parameters:
      values - values to join
      delimiter - delimiter between values
      Returns:
      joined string

    • normalizeLegacyPropertyObjects

      private static void normalizeLegacyPropertyObjects(com.google.gson.JsonObject properties)
      Converts legacy {value, unit} property objects to [value, unit] arrays expected by the JsonProcessBuilder reflection setter logic.
      Parameters:
      properties - mutable properties object

    • errorJson

      private static String errorJson(String code, String message, String remediation)
      Creates a standard error JSON response.
      Parameters:
      code - the error code
      message - the error message
      remediation - the fix suggestion
      Returns:
      JSON error string

    • errorJson

      private static String errorJson(List<SimulationResult.ErrorDetail> errors, List<String> warnings)
      Creates a standard error JSON response from detailed simulation errors.
      Parameters:
      errors - simulation errors to expose
      warnings - non-fatal warnings to expose
      Returns:
      JSON error string
